title: Augment Jornada Models
description: Add dual tolerances, closing time, and partial absence flag fields to Jornada-related models/schema, ensuring calendar selection relationships are represented.

title: Persist Calendar Selections
description: Extend Jornada persistence logic to store and retrieve linked calendar application selections for each jornada instance.

title: Update Jornada CRUD Endpoints
description: Modify create, update, list, and detail handlers under Backend/routes/Jornada to read/write the new Jornada fields and calendar selections.

title: Create Database Migration
description: Add migration scripts to introduce the new Jornada columns and any join tables for calendar selections, covering schema upgrade/downgrade paths.
